# Web Server Templates

Backend web server starter templates for multiple languages

| Template | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [C# Basic Webserver](csharp-basic-webserver.md) | ASP.NET Core server with health endpoint and Docker support |
| [Go Basic Webserver](golang-basic-webserver.md) | Go web server using net/http with health endpoint and Docker support |
| [Java Basic Webserver](java-basic-webserver.md) | Spring Boot server with health endpoint and Docker support |
| [PHP Basic Webserver](php-basic-webserver.md) | PHP web server using built-in server with health endpoint and Docker support |
| [Python Basic Webserver](python-basic-webserver.md) | Minimal Flask server with health endpoint and Docker support |
| [TypeScript Basic Webserver](typescript-basic-webserver.md) | Express.js server with TypeScript, health endpoint, and Docker support |
